# City of Red Vale DBPI Service Catalog

## Department Service Portfolio

| Service ID | Service Name | Purpose | Primary Unit | Typical Inputs | Primary Outputs | Primary Parties |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| SVC-DBPI-001 | Permit Intake and Case Creation | Receive applications and create official cases | Permit Services Division | Application forms, plans, owner/applicant data, parcel/address, valuation, supporting documents | Accepted application, deficiency notice, application record | Applicants, owners, contractors, design professionals |
| SVC-DBPI-002 | Plan Review | Evaluate submitted materials for compliance | Plan Review Division | Accepted application, plan sets, calculations, revisions, prior comments | Approval, correction notice, denial recommendation, routed review record | Applicants, architects, engineers, reviewers |
| SVC-DBPI-003 | Permit Issuance | Issue authorization to perform approved work | Permit Services Division | Approved reviews, fee status, responsible-party verification | Issued permit, permit conditions, approved plan association | Owners, contractors, applicants |
| SVC-DBPI-004 | Permit Revision Processing | Process changes after intake or issuance | Permit Services / Plan Review | Revision narrative, revised plans, updated scope | Revision acceptance, revised conditions, new review cycle | Applicants, contractors, reviewers |
| SVC-DBPI-005 | Inspection Scheduling | Create and manage inspection requests | Field Inspections Division | Permit number, inspection type, requester info, scheduling preferences | Inspection request, scheduled slot, cancellation notice | Contractors, owners, tenants |
| SVC-DBPI-006 | Field Inspection | Verify work in the field | Field Inspections Division | Inspection request, permit record, site conditions, approved plans | Inspection result, correction items, inspection notes, photographs | Inspectors, contractors, occupants |
| SVC-DBPI-007 | Certificate and Final Approval | Conclude permit work and authorize final occupancy or completion | Permit Services / Field Inspections | Completed inspections, verified corrections, final sign-offs | Finaled permit, certificate, closure record | Owners, tenants, contractors |
| SVC-DBPI-008 | Complaint Intake | Receive complaints about suspected violations or unsafe conditions | Code Enforcement Division | Complaint description, location, complainant data if provided, attachments | Complaint log, referral, closure without action, investigation assignment | Public, council offices, agencies |
| SVC-DBPI-009 | Code Enforcement Investigation | Investigate unlawful, unsafe, or unpermitted conditions | Code Enforcement Division | Complaint record, site history, property data, evidence | Case opening, warning, notice of violation, referral, closure | Owners, occupants, inspectors, investigators |
| SVC-DBPI-010 | Compliance and Enforcement Action | Drive correction and resolve violation cases | Code Enforcement Division | Open case, deadlines, evidence of noncompliance, legal authority | Corrective action plan, stop-work directive, civil penalty referral, case closure | Owners, contractors, City Attorney |
| SVC-DBPI-011 | Appeals and Hearings Support | Support formal challenge of adverse actions | Appeals and Hearings Liaison | Appeal filing, case record, notice record, hearing schedule | Hearing packet, hearing outcome, appeal disposition | Appellants, hearing officers, legal staff |
| SVC-DBPI-012 | Records and Certified Copies | Provide public access to official records | Records and Disclosure Unit | Records request, identity/payment data when required, retrieval criteria | Responsive records set, exemption notice, certified copy, invoice | Public, owners, attorneys, title companies |
| SVC-DBPI-013 | Contractor and License Verification | Confirm license and responsible-party standing | Permit Services Division | Contractor identifiers, state license references | Verification note, intake hold, referral | Contractors, applicants |
| SVC-DBPI-014 | Fee Assessment and Payment Processing | Calculate and collect authorized charges | Permit Services / Finance | Service type, valuation, requested copies, reinspection trigger | Fee record, invoice, payment receipt, refund record | Applicants, owners, requesters |
| SVC-DBPI-015 | Interagency Referral and Concurrence | Coordinate cases requiring review by other departments | Permit Services / Plan Review | Application or case record, referral trigger, documents | Referral record, concurrence, conditions, hold | Planning, fire, public works, environmental health |

## Public Service Commitments

### Permit Intake and Case Creation
- Published acceptance channels: online portal, counter service, interdepartmental routing
- Target: same-day record creation for complete submissions received during business hours
- Standard outputs: accepted application or deficiency notice

### Plan Review
- Reviews are routed by discipline and complexity
- Standard outputs: approval, correction cycle, hold pending referral, or denial recommendation
- Every material reviewer decision is recorded against a case or document

### Inspection Scheduling and Field Inspection
- Scheduling occurs by permit and inspection type
- Inspectors may record pass, partial pass, fail, no access, cancellation, or unsafe condition escalation
- Corrections are tied to property, permit, and where relevant, cited code sections

### Complaint and Enforcement Services
- Anonymous complaints may be received subject to policy limits
- Emergency unsafe conditions receive accelerated triage
- Progressive enforcement is preferred unless immediate danger requires summary action

### Records and Certified Copies
- Official records are released under public-records law, subject to exemptions
- Certified copies require authenticity controls and fee handling
- Response timing is governed by legal authority and records policy

## Service Relationships

- SVC-DBPI-001 is a prerequisite for SVC-DBPI-002 and SVC-DBPI-003
- SVC-DBPI-005 is generally a prerequisite for SVC-DBPI-006
- SVC-DBPI-006 often drives SVC-DBPI-007 or SVC-DBPI-010
- SVC-DBPI-008 may trigger SVC-DBPI-009
- SVC-DBPI-009 may trigger SVC-DBPI-010 and SVC-DBPI-011
- SVC-DBPI-012 interacts with all other services because records are produced across the portfolio
